title: Pink Dolphin
description: This resource pack adds a rare pink dolphin variant to your game.
body:
This resource pack adds a rare pink dolphin variant to your game.
___________________________________________________________________________________________________

### IMPORTANT

This resource pack will NOT work without optifine sadly.

The pink dolphin variant might not be visible to all players, if it doesn't, I don't know how to fix it.


#### TERMS OF USE

Do NOT upload this to any other site and/or claim this as your own.

Do NOT take and use the pink dolphin variant for your own project. 

You CAN modify the code to make the pink dolphin spawn rate higher if you'd like.
